memoryArtifacts.description: Crest of noble House van Hornes Houtekerke. Same Bruce standing white lion design. Similar lion design as in House of Beauvua coat of arms except in silver. Blazon: Welf rampant lion argent on two quarterlies sable; three blowhorns gules on two quarterlies Or.
Armorial achievement of: County and House of Dagsburg.
memoryArtifacts.place: Roman, Yakut ASSR, Russia, Soviet Union

memoryArtifacts.description: Coat of arms of Agnès De Rieneck De Looz De Blieskastel De Metz.
Dagsburg and Eigisheim wedding coat of arms.
Mathilde ( Mechthild) Von Metz (born Von Dagsburg-Moha Von Egisheim). Man with yello cape and white gown.
Coat of arms of Dagsburg, Germania and von Berg.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda von Dagsburg was born about 1096, her father, Albrecht I. von Egisheim-Dagsburg, was 44 and her mother, Ermesinde von Luxembourg, was 18. She married Folmar V de Metz in 1120. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1157, in Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, France, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda von Dagsburg est née environ 1096, son père, Albrecht I. von Egisheim-Dagsburg, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Ermesinde von Luxembourg, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Folmar V de Metz en 1120. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1157, à Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda von Dagsburg um 1096 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albrecht I. von Egisheim-Dagsburg 44 und ihre Mutter Ermesinde von Luxembourg 18. Sie hat 1120 Folmar V de Metz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1157 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Metz, Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda von Dagsburg è nata il circa 1096, sua padre, Albrecht I. von Egisheim-Dagsburg, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Ermesinde von Luxembourg, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Folmar V de Metz nel 1120. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1157, nel Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 63 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda von Dagsburg(이)가 대략 1096년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albrecht I. von Egisheim-Dagsburg(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermesinde von Luxembourg(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1120년 Folmar V de Metz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1157년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 모셀 멧즈에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda von Dagsburg родилась около 1096 г., её отцу по имени Albrecht I. von Egisheim-Dagsburg было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Ermesinde von Luxembourg, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Folmar V de Metz в 1120 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1157 г. в местности мец, моселл, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 63 лет.
